title: Butter Chicken Classic Murgh Makhani

seo.title: Best Butter Chicken Recipe | Classic Murgh Makhani
seo.metaDescription: Master the art of authentic Indian Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) with our classic recipe. Creamy, rich, and flavorful – perfect for a homemade feast. Get the step-by-step guide!
longTailKeywords: Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani step by step
seo.h1: The Best Classic Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) Recipe
h2Headings: Ingredients You'll Need for Butter Chicken
Step-by-Step Instructions for Classic Murgh Makhani
Pro Tips for the Best Butter Chicken Results
Serving Suggestions for Your Murgh Makhani
Variations and Substitutions for Butter Chicken
seo.imageAlt: A bowl of classic Indian Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) garnished with fresh cilantro, ready to serve with naan bread.
seo.imageCaption: Indulge in the rich, creamy flavors of our classic Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) – an authentic Indian delight perfect for any meal.

description: Butter Chicken, or Murgh Makhani, is a beloved Indian curry known for its rich, creamy tomato-based sauce. This classic recipe features tender chicken marinated in yogurt and spices, then simmered to perfection in a luscious, mildly spiced gravy. It is a comforting and flavorful dish that truly captures the essence of Indian cuisine.

ingredients.notes: soaked in warm water for 15 min

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine chicken pieces with yogurt, 1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste, lemon juice, Kashmiri red chili powder, turmeric powder, 1/2 teaspoon garam masala, and salt. Mix well to coat the chicken. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or preferably 2-4 hours for best flavor.

instructions.title: Cook the Marinated Chicken
instructions.text: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large pan or skillet over medium-high heat. Add the marinated chicken in a single layer, working in batches if necessary to avoid overcrowding. Cook for 5-7 minutes, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside.

instructions.title: Prepare the Sauce Base
instructions.text: In the same pan, melt the remaining 3 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add chopped onion and saute until softened and translucent, about 5-7 minutes. Stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste, green cardamom pods, cinnamon stick, and bay leaf. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.

instructions.title: Simmer the Tomato Gravy
instructions.text: Add tomato puree, soaked cashews (drained), sugar, and a pinch of salt to the pan. Bring to a simmer, then cover and cook for 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the tomatoes have broken down and the sauce has thickened slightly. Remove the bay leaf, cinnamon stick, and cardamom pods.

instructions.title: Blend the Sauce
instructions.text: Carefully transfer the sauce mixture to a blender. Add 1/2 cup water or chicken broth. Blend until completely smooth and creamy. For an extra silky sauce, you may pass it through a fine-mesh sieve back into the pan. This step is optional but recommended for restaurant-style texture.

instructions.title: Combine and Finish
instructions.text: Return the blended sauce to the pan over medium-low heat. Add the cooked chicken pieces and the remaining 1/2 teaspoon garam masala. Stir well to combine. Simmer for 5-7 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the chicken to heat through. Stir in the heavy cream and crushed fenugreek leaves. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, ensuring the sauce does not boil after adding cream. Taste and adjust salt or sugar if needed.

instructions.title: Serve Hot
instructions.text: Garnish with fresh chopped cilantro and serve hot with naan bread, roti, or basmati rice. Enjoy your homemade Classic Butter Chicken!

tips: For a deeper flavor, marinate the chicken overnight. The yogurt helps tenderize the meat, and the spices infuse more thoroughly.
Do not skip the kasuri methi (dried fenugreek leaves) as it provides a distinct, nutty aroma that is quintessential to authentic Butter Chicken.
If you prefer a spicier kick, add a pinch of cayenne pepper or a chopped green chili along with the ginger-garlic paste to the sauce base.
article: Butter Chicken Classic Murgh Makhani is a beloved Indian Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Indian. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
